content: Abraham Finch: It's been a long day, Abigail. The crops are looking good, but I can't shake this feeling of unease. Something tells me that we're not out of the woods yet. Abigail Finch: I understand, Abraham. But we've survived this long, haven't we? We're stronger than we think. And as long as we have each other, we'll make it through anything. Abraham Finch: You're right, Abigail. And speaking of which, how have you been holding up? I know things have been stressful lately, with Jake running away and everything. Abigail Finch: It's been difficult, Abraham. But I'm trying to stay strong for our family. I just want everything to go back to normal, you know? Abraham Finch: I do know, Abigail. And I'm sorry for my part in all of this. I shouldn't have let our arguments escalate so much.

Abigail Finch: Abraham, I think it's time for us to get some rest. It's been a long day, and we've got another one ahead of us tomorrow. Let's put our differences aside and focus on taking care of our family. Abraham Finch: Agreed, Abigail. Let's go to bed and get some much-needed sleep. We'll face whatever comes our way in the morning, together. Abigail Finch: That's right, Abraham. Together. Goodnight. Abraham Finch: Goodnight, Abigail.

Abraham Finch: You two ladies best keep yer goddamn voices down—some of us got honest work at sunrise, not just sprawlin’ in the dirt suckin’ off some old-world merc. Cait: Oh piss off, farmer boy. Ain’t my fault yer too weak to handle a real woman like me ridin’ MJR raw while yer stuck jerkin’ it to Brahmin tits. Bet that heirloom sword of yers ain’t the only tiny blade in the family, huh? Abraham Finch: Goddamn heathen whore—this is why the Commonwealth’s gone to shit! Women like you spreadin’ their legs for synth-lovin’ degenerates instead of raisin’ proper families. Cait: HA! Like yer fuckin’ family did so great—yer own son joined the Forged just to escape yer preachin’. Meanwhile, I’m keepin’ MJR’s cock warm while Piper’s over there chokin’ on radroach-flavored guilt for likin’ it rough. Human cock first, synth-fuckers last—that’s the Finch way, right?

Abraham Finch: Bah, waste of breath arguin’ with chem-addled gutter trash. Go on, crawl back to yer merc’s bedroll—doubt he notices the difference between you and a feral once the lights are out. Cait: Keep cryin’ about it, pops. Maybe if ya spent less time bitchin’ and more time trainin’, yer damn kid wouldn’t need raiders to teach him how to be a man. Now if you’ll excuse me, I got a real patriot’s dick to polish. Semper Fi, fuckface.
